source_description: Refactor the kasmos TUI (built in feature 002) to adopt 5 community ratatui crates (tui-logger, tui-popup, throbber-widgets-tui, ratatui-macros, tui-nodes), replacing hand-rolled implementations and adding WP dependency graph visualization. Each adoption is independently mergeable. A final UX polish WP adds help overlay, status footer, progress summary, WP detail popups, responsive layout, lane scrolling, failure badges, notification cycling, and module extraction.
